label: Implement AI Agent
description: Offer a 24/7 AI chat agent for customer enquiries

default.subject: AI assistant for {{NAME}} — free demo
default.body:
Hi {{NAME}},

I came across {{NAME}} in {{CITY}} and thought this might be useful for you.

We set up a 24/7 AI chat agent that answers customer questions, captures enquiries, and can book appointments — even outside business hours.

We can show you a free demo on your site with no commitment. Just reply if you'd like to see how it works.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

{{PRODUCT_LABEL}}
